FR-01.title: User Registration
requirements: Register with phone number or email
Set delivery address with map pin

FR-02.title: Store Browsing
requirements: Display nearby grocery stores based on location
Store details with hours, delivery time, and minimum order

FR-03.title: Product Catalog
requirements: Browse products by category and subcategory
Product details with nutritional info and alternatives

FR-04.title: Smart Shopping Lists
requirements: Add items from browsing or manually

FR-05.title: Shopping Cart
requirements: Cart total with delivery fee and taxes

FR-09.title: Shopper App
requirements: View assigned orders with item lists
Mark order as ready for delivery

FR-10.title: Rating and Tips
requirements: Refund request for missing or damaged items

FR-01.title: Plan User Registration Workflow and Contracts
FR-01.description: Review the SRS requirement bullets for user registration and break them into executable API, UI, data, security, and reporting subtasks. Define the workflow states, user roles, field-level validations, request/response contracts, and failure cases before implementation starts. Use these requirement drivers as the baseline: Register with phone number or email; Set delivery address with map pin; Save multiple delivery addresses.
acceptance_criteria: The end-to-end workflow for user registration is documented from trigger to completion
Validation rules, role restrictions, and error scenarios for user registration are explicitly defined
Implementation subtasks for user registration can be picked up independently by engineering

FR-01.title: Implement User Registration Backend Services
FR-01.description: Build the backend services for user registration on React Native, Node.js, MongoDB, Redis. Create route handlers or service endpoints, model the core business operations, enforce validation and authorization rules, persist workflow state changes, and add structured error handling and audit logging. Make sure the implementation covers these behaviors: Register with phone number or email; Set delivery address with map pin; Save multiple delivery addresses.
acceptance_criteria: Core user registration business rules are implemented for Grocery Delivery Application
Validation, authorization, and error handling are covered for user registration
API/service behavior for user registration is testable and documented for integration

FR-01.title: Implement User Registration Frontend Flow
FR-01.description: Build the frontend flow for user registration with the exact forms, tables, filters, wizards, status indicators, and action buttons required by the SRS. Connect the UI to the backend contract, handle optimistic updates or refresh flows where needed, and provide user-facing validation, permissions feedback, loading states, and recovery states.
acceptance_criteria: The user registration user flow is accessible and responsive across supported browsers
Forms, filters, tables, and feedback states for user registration behave correctly
The user registration UI is fully integrated with backend APIs and handles loading and error states

FR-01.title: Integrate External Dependencies for User Registration
FR-01.description: Implement the external integration points used by user registration, such as third-party APIs, SSO, messaging gateways, payment rails, import/export pipelines, or bank feeds. Add retry-safe behavior, timeout handling, observability, and fallback behavior for downstream failures.
acceptance_criteria: External dependencies used by user registration are connected through stable integration layers
Timeout, retry, and failure handling for user registration integrations are implemented and testable
Secrets, credentials, and integration logs for user registration are handled securely

FR-01.title: Write User Registration Automated and End-to-End Tests
FR-01.description: Write unit, integration, and end-to-end tests for user registration. Cover valid flows, invalid inputs, permission failures, state transitions, data integrity checks, and regression-prone edge cases pulled from the SRS. Add fixtures or mocks that make the feature verifiable in CI and local development.
acceptance_criteria: Happy path and failure cases for user registration are covered by automated tests
Permission checks and validation rules for user registration are verified
Regression coverage exists for the most critical user registration scenarios
